'''Copperline''' was a [[Planet/Legends|world]] of poor farmers that was plagued by [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] for decades. In [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]], the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] and [[Imperial Army/Legends|Army]], including at least one unit of [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]], cleaned out the pirates in a five-month-long operation.

[[Daric LaRone]] was born on this world in [[28 BBY/Legends|28 BBY]], who witnessing of a [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] operation in [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]] that ended the pirate scourge which greatly influenced his desire to enlist in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] when he came of age.
